title: Cybianthus duidae
intro: Cybianthus duidae, also known as Duidae's nightshade or Duid's nightshade, is a species of flowering plant in the family Primulaceae. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, and its extracts have been used to treat various health issues, including fever, inflammation, and respiratory problems due to its antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory properties. The bioactive constituents of Cybianthus duidae include flavonoids, alkaloids, and terpenoids, which contribute to its medicinal effects. The plant is traditionally used to prepare herbal teas and infusions, as well as tinctures and extracts, which are often used in traditional medicine to treat respiratory issues and fevers.
